About Me

Hi there! I am William Golovlev. I'm a passionate developer exploring new technologies and building projects to share with the world. This website is a space for me to showcase my work and share my thoughts on what I'm learning. My focus lies at the intersection of technical precision and human-centric design.

Experience

2024 – Present

Software Developer — RoadOne IntermodaLogistics

  • Developed and maintained logistics management systems using C# and .NET
  • Implemented real-time tracking and reporting features
  • Optimized database queries improving system performance by 30%
  • Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver scalable solutions
2023

Backend Developer Intern — Nuubi

  • Built RESTful APIs for mobile application backend
  • Integrated third-party payment processing systems
  • Developed authentication and authorization middleware
  • Participated in code reviews and agile development processes
2023

DevSecOps/Functional Analyst Intern — MetLife

  • Analyzed security vulnerabilities in enterprise applications
  • Developed automated security testing pipelines
  • Created functional specifications for insurance software systems
  • Collaborated with development teams on security best practices
2021 – 2023

Computer Science Tutor — Laney College

  • Tutored students in Python, Java, and C++ programming
  • Developed educational materials for data structures and algorithms
  • Assisted students with debugging and code optimization
  • Conducted review sessions for technical interviews

Technical Skills

AI & Machine Learning

  • PyTorch
  • Python (Scikit-Learn)
  • Neural Networks

Full Stack Development

Cloud & Infrastructure
